sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The game is NOT_FINISHED state! Clicking on the purple ring at [20, 39] changed the scene! Now I can see:
- The white diamond shape has moved to near the purple ring
- The path is now going from the white diamond down to the gray diamond
- The purple square is now purple
- The gray diamond is still at the bottom
Let me check the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in after:
    if n['color'] in ['p', 'M', 'w', 'G', 'W', 'g']:
        print(n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], n['boundary'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I can see the scene has changed significantly:
- The white diamond is now at [18-22, 37-41] - it moved to the purple ring position!
- There's a white path going from the white diamond down to the gray diamond at [57-61, 25-29]
- The purple square is now at [39, 33]
- The gray diamond is at [59, 27]
- The white timer bar is now at [1, 0] to [63, 0] - it's a full bar at the left edge!
- The purple ring is now at [37-41, 31-35]
So clicking on the purple ring at [20, 39] moved the white diamond to the ring position and created a path down to the gray diamond. Now I need to click on the purple ring at [39, 33] to move the white diamond further down the path!
